firmware.title: Android 10 - Helpful, smart, and simple
firmware.description:
Introducing Android 10
New ways to customize your phone, control your privacy & get things done.

Your device will be updated to Android 10. Learn more at android.com/10.

New features include:
- Dark theme
- Navigate your phone with gestures
- Additional controls for privacy & location
- Quick actions & replies in notifications

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.

firmware.title: Android 10
firmware.description: This update fixes critical bugs and improves the performance and stability of your device. If you download updates over the cellular network or while roaming, additional charges may apply.

firmware.title: Android 10
firmware.description: This is the final software update containing improvements and bug fixes for Pixel and Pixel XL devices. For more information on your device’s ongoing support go to: https://support.google.com/pixelphone
